entries.source: Public pages, topic chats, learning paths, blog guides, and help pages are designed to be easy to find and share.
entries.value: Javne strani, tematski klepeti, učne poti, vodniki na blogu in strani s pomočjo so zasnovani tako, da jih je enostavno najti in deliti.

entries.source: Start learning
entries.value: Začni se učiti

entries.source: Public learning pages are open, while API routes, admin routes, reset flows, and private utility pages remain blocked.
entries.value: Javne učne strani so odprte, medtem ko poti API, skrbniške poti, tokovi ponastavitve in zasebne strani s pripomočki ostanejo blokirani.

entries.source: Each learning mode has a public link so learners can start directly inside the right learning experience.
entries.value: Vsak način učenja ima javno povezavo, da lahko učenci začnejo neposredno v pravi učni izkušnji.

entries.source: Use this when referencing public/private boundaries, learner safety, and school trust.
entries.value: Uporabi to pri omembah javnih in zasebnih meja, varnosti učencev ter zaupanja šol.

entries.source: AI content index
entries.value: Kazalo vsebin o AI

entries.source: Unlike a generic chatbot, inspir organizes AI around learning modes so learners can start with the kind of help they need: hints, questions, quizzes, active recall, roleplay, debate, or feedback.
entries.value: Za razliko od splošnega klepetalnika inspir organizira umetno inteligenco okoli učnih načinov, da lahko učenci začnejo z vrsto pomoči, ki jo potrebujejo: namigi, vprašanji, kvizi, aktivnim priklicem, igranjem vlog, debato ali povratnimi informacijami.

entries.source: School deployments can be adapted around custom content, workflows, prompts, and NCERT-aligned learning needs where appropriate.
entries.value: Šolske uvedbe je mogoče po potrebi prilagoditi vsebini po meri, delovnim tokovom, pozivom in učnim potrebam, usklajenim z NCERT.

entries.source: Learning behavior comes first
entries.value: Učno vedenje je na prvem mestu

entries.source: Public guest modes give anyone a useful place to start, while school and partner deployments can adapt the experience for local needs.
entries.value: Javni gostujoči načini vsakomur ponudijo uporabno izhodišče, šolske in partnerske uvedbe pa lahko izkušnjo prilagodijo lokalnim potrebam.

entries.source: Every core learning mode has a public guest entrypoint so people can start from search, social, or a shared link.
entries.value: Vsak osrednji učni način ima javno vstopno točko za goste, zato lahko ljudje začnejo iz iskanja, družbenih omrežij ali deljene povezave.

entries.source: Can a rollout start small?
entries.value: Ali se lahko uvedba začne v majhnem obsegu?

entries.source: A clear explanation of guest mode, private chats, learner safety, and school trust.
entries.value: Jasna razlaga gostujočega načina, zasebnih klepetov, varnosti učencev in zaupanja šol.

entries.source: The public statement of why inspir exists and what learning access means.
entries.value: Javna izjava o tem, zakaj inspir obstaja in kaj pomeni dostop do učenja.

entries.source: 1M+ learners
entries.value: Več kot 1 milijon učencev

entries.source: The goal is not to make people passive in front of AI. The goal is to give every learner a patient first place to ask, practise, get feedback, try again, and build confidence.
entries.value: Cilj ni, da bi ljudje pred umetno inteligenco postali pasivni. Cilj je vsakemu učencu dati potrpežljivo prvo mesto za vprašanja, vajo, povratne informacije, ponovne poskuse in gradnjo samozavesti.

entries.source: The public modes are designed around learning behavior: hints, Socratic questions, step checks, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, review loops, and active explanation.

entries.value: Dostop se lahko financira prek partnerskih šol ali podpira prek sponzorskih poti družbene odgovornosti podjetij za skupnosti, ki potrebujejo subvencionirano učenje z AI.

entries.source: The public product, the school pathway, and the content library should all point back to the same principle: learning should stay active, accessible, and useful.
entries.value: Javni izdelek, šolska pot in knjižnica vsebin bi morali vsi kazati nazaj k istemu načelu: učenje naj ostane aktivno, dostopno in uporabno.

entries.source: 100+ countries
entries.value: 100+ držav

entries.source: Quality learning should feel available, human, and alive.
entries.value: Kakovostno učenje bi moralo delovati dostopno, človeško in živo.

entries.source: inspir is organized around learning modes such as Socratic tutoring, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, maths steps, writing critique, and exam planning, so students land in a more focused learning behavior.
entries.value: inspir je organiziran okoli učnih načinov, kot so sokratsko mentorstvo, namigi za domače naloge, kvizi, učne kartice, matematični koraki, kritika pisanja in načrtovanje izpitov, zato učenci pristanejo v bolj osredotočenem učnem vedenju.

entries.value: Preizkusi javne gostujoče načine

entries.source: The mission is connected to real product surfaces.
entries.value: Poslanstvo je povezano s konkretnimi deli izdelka.

entries.source: inspir makes learning modes open at /chat/{topicSlug}, letting learners land directly inside the right AI learning experience without needing a saved private chat.
entries.value: inspir omogoča, da se učni načini odprejo na /chat/{topicSlug}, kar učečim se omogoča, da pristanejo neposredno v pravi učni izkušnji z umetno inteligenco, ne da bi potrebovali shranjen zasebni klepet.

entries.source: The public product stays easy to try: learners can land directly on a learning mode and begin as a guest. Schools and CSR partners can support tailored deployments when communities need confidentiality, curriculum alignment, or subsidised access.
entries.value: Javni izdelek ostaja enostaven za preizkus: učenci lahko pristanejo neposredno v učnem načinu in začnejo kot gostje. Šole in partnerji v okviru družbene odgovornosti podjetij lahko podprejo prilagojene uvedbe, kadar skupnosti potrebujejo zaupnost, uskladitev z učnim načrtom ali subvencioniran dostop.

entries.source: Schools can evaluate public modes first, then discuss tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, content needs, and funded access.
entries.value: Šole lahko najprej ocenijo javne načine, nato pa se pogovorijo o prilagojenih delovnih tokovih, načrtovanju zaupnosti, vsebinskih potrebah in financiranem dostopu.

entries.source: From Facebook quizzes and offline events to applied AI learning infrastructure.
entries.value: Od Facebook kvizov in dogodkov zunaj spleta do uporabne učne infrastrukture z UI.

entries.source: The strongest angle is free public AI learning that opens directly in guest mode and keeps learners active through mode-specific teaching rather than generic answer generation.
entries.value: Najmočnejši zorni kot je brezplačno javno AI učenje, ki se odpre neposredno v načinu za goste in učence ohranja aktivne s poučevanjem, prilagojenim posameznemu načinu, ne pa s splošnim ustvarjanjem odgovorov.

entries.source: Why are public learning pages easy to share?
entries.value: Zakaj je javne učne strani enostavno deliti?

entries.source: The written learning library that supports prompts, study loops, and deeper practice.
entries.value: Pisna učna knjižnica, ki podpira pozive, učne zanke in globljo vajo.

entries.source: inspir is organized around hints, questions, quizzes, flashcards, debate, review, and explanation instead of passive answer-copying.
entries.value: inspir je organiziran okoli namigov, vprašanj, kvizov, učnih kartic, debate, ponavljanja in razlage namesto pasivnega prepisovanja odgovorov.

entries.source: Default guest tutor
entries.value: Privzeti gostujoči tutor

entries.source: What is the most useful product angle for coverage?
entries.value: Kateri produktni zorni kot je najbolj uporaben za medijsko poročanje?

entries.source: Different learning jobs need different interaction shapes, so inspir uses active, mode-specific teaching. A homework hint, Socratic question, historical simulation, flashcard review, and writing critique should not behave like the same generic chat.
entries.value: Različne učne naloge potrebujejo različne oblike interakcije, zato inspir uporablja aktivno poučevanje, prilagojeno posameznemu načinu. Namig za domačo nalogo, sokratsko vprašanje, zgodovinska simulacija, ponavljanje z učnimi karticami in kritika pisanja se ne bi smeli obnašati kot isti generični klepet.

entries.source: Mission | inspir
entries.value: Poslanstvo | inspir

entries.source: Schools can test public guest modes first, then use the schools page to explore tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, NCERT-aligned options, and funded access.
entries.value: Šole lahko najprej preizkusijo javne gostujoče načine, nato pa na strani za šole raziščejo prilagojene delovne tokove, načrtovanje zaupnosti, možnosti, usklajene z NCERT, in financiran dostop.

entries.source: Teachers and leaders can start with Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards before a formal rollout.
entries.value: Učitelji in vodstveni delavci lahko pred uradno uvedbo začnejo z načini „Nauči se karkoli“, „Sokratsko poučevanje“, „Pomočnik pri domačih nalogah“, kvizi in učnimi karticami.

entries.source: Different jobs need different modes: Socratic questions, homework hints, flashcards, debate, history roleplay, writing critique, and more.
entries.value: Različne naloge potrebujejo različne načine: sokratska vprašanja, namige za domače naloge, učne kartice, debato, zgodovinsko igro vlog, kritiko pisanja in drugo.

entries.source: Yes. Public topic entrypoints such as /chat/learn-anything and /chat/socratic-instruction are open learning pages that anyone can try.
entries.value: Da. Javne tematske vstopne točke, kot sta /chat/learn-anything in /chat/socratic-instruction, so odprte učne strani, ki jih lahko preizkusi kdor koli.

entries.source: A capable learning companion should not depend on geography, family income, or whether a learner already knows the right person to ask.
entries.value: Sposoben učni spremljevalec ne bi smel biti odvisen od geografije, družinskega dohodka ali od tega, ali učenec že pozna pravo osebo, ki bi jo lahko vprašal.

entries.source: inspir's mission is to make learning accessible, engaging, enjoyable, and useful for everyone through free public AI learning tools.
entries.value: Poslanstvo inspir je z brezplačnimi javnimi učnimi orodji z umetno inteligenco narediti učenje dostopno, privlačno, prijetno in koristno za vse.

entries.source: After the inspir.app domain was sold to fund continued free access, the live product moved to inspirlearning.com.

entries.source: The platform worked on curriculum ingestion, retrieval, structured learning flows, and early AI tutoring experiences.
entries.value: Platforma je delala na vnosu učnih načrtov, pridobivanju informacij, strukturiranih učnih tokovih in zgodnjih izkušnjah tutorstva z umetno inteligenco.

entries.source: More than 100 guides, prompt loops, and pillar clusters for AI-assisted learning.
entries.value: Več kot 100 vodnikov, zank pozivov in stebrnih sklopov za učenje s pomočjo umetne inteligence.

entries.source: The platform is designed to help people reason, practise, remember, and explain ideas back instead of collecting finished answers.
entries.value: Platforma je zasnovana tako, da ljudem pomaga razmišljati, vaditi, si zapomniti in ideje ponovno razložiti, namesto da bi zbirali dokončane odgovore.

entries.source: Private tutoring is powerful, but it is unevenly distributed. inspir uses AI to widen access while keeping the learner active: hints before answers, questions before lectures, and practice after explanation.
entries.value: Zasebno mentorstvo je močno, vendar je neenakomerno porazdeljeno. inspir uporablja umetno inteligenco, da razširi dostop, pri tem pa učenca ohranja aktivnega: namigi pred odgovori, vprašanja pred predavanji in vaja po razlagi.

entries.source: inspir organizes AI around active learning behaviors: hints, questions, quizzes, flashcards, critique, and review.
entries.value: inspir organizira umetno inteligenco okoli aktivnih učnih vedenj: namigov, vprašanj, kvizov, učnih kartic, kritike in ponavljanja.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest modes let school leaders and teachers try the learning experience before discussing a tailored school deployment.

entries.source: Evaluate a public AI learning layer first, then explore custom workflows, confidentiality needs, content alignment, and usage funding.

entries.source: The goal is to help people find the right public learning page quickly. Public routes, guides, and learning hubs are open; API, admin, reset, and private utility routes stay closed.

entries.source: inspir began in 2013 as a public quiz and learning community, grew through schools and student networks, and later developed AI learning infrastructure and public AI tutoring experiences.
entries.value: inspir se je leta 2013 začel kot javna skupnost za kvize in učenje, zrasel skozi šole in študentska omrežja ter pozneje razvil infrastrukturo za učenje z umetno inteligenco in javne izkušnje mentorstva z umetno inteligenco.

entries.source: inspir exists to make learning accessible, engaging, enjoyable, and useful for anyone with curiosity, whether they are a student, parent, teacher, or self-taught learner.
entries.value: inspir obstaja zato, da naredi učenje dostopno, privlačno, prijetno in uporabno za vsakogar z radovednostjo, ne glede na to, ali je učenec, starš, učitelj ali samouk.
